rationale: The cited paper focuses on conceptual vs. perceptual implicit memory and their effects on memory-based versus stimulus-based brand choice, which closely matches the citing paper’s focal constructs (conceptual/perceptual priming, accessibility, and consumer choice outcomes). With this strong mechanism-level overlap and a confirmed DOI-level reference match (10.1509/jmkr.39.4.440.19119), the citation is plausibly substantive rather than a generic background mention.
